CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "General_Info" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cvim&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1566209683000", "" , 30, 30), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Assuta_360" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cqMa&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1564667712000", "" , 30, 30), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Appointments" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cvkY&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1566202447000", "" , 30, 30), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "DOC_expert" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cvkd&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1566202510000", "" , 30, 30), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Surgery" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cvki&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1566209350000", "" , 30, 30), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Doctor_Case" , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cvkx&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1566202648000", "" , 30, 30), ""))))))
CustomField.label: Case Record Type Icon
